metadata.methodology: GitHub Issues Search API — query: repo:QwenLM/Qwen-Agent is:issue is:closed label:"Work in Progress"
metadata.significance: These 2 issues embody the beautiful open-source lifecycle — features conceived, developed collaboratively, and successfully completed by the Qwen-Agent community

closed_wip_issues.title: 开源的qwen模型是否支持function call
closed_wip_issues.translation: Does the open-source Qwen model support function calling?
closed_wip_issues.author: robin-xl
closed_wip_issues.significance: Explored function calling — a foundational capability for autonomous agent frameworks

closed_wip_issues.title: qwen-agent支持连接数据库，对表格进行数据分析么？
closed_wip_issues.translation: Does Qwen-Agent support connecting to databases for table data analysis?
closed_wip_issues.author: cheng18175030250
closed_wip_issues.significance: Explored database connectivity and tabular data analysis — real-world enterprise use cases for agents

insights.community_engagement: Both closed WIP issues represent community-driven inquiries that evolved into completed features in the Qwen-Agent framework
insights.development_timeline: Issues spanned from March to June 2024, showcasing the QwenLM team's commitment to feature development
insights.key_observation: The 'Work in Progress' label serves as a bridge between community feature requests and their eventual integration into the autonomous agent framework
insights.collaborative_spirit: 21 total comments across 2 issues demonstrate vibrant community discussion and collaborative problem-solving
